summary: Iteration 2 - All 26 backend tests passed (100%). Verified all 5 bug fixes from iteration 1 and added 2 new test cases for natural language copilot queries.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_chemistry_api.py (Updated tests to reflect bug fixes, added 2 new tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 1 stabilization bugs have been fixed and verified. Test suite expanded from 24 to 26 tests. Key fixes verified: (1) Empty SMILES validation returns valid=false, (2) Copilot intent parsing handles natural language queries like 'How can I reduce the cost?', (3) ClaudeService always initializes client attribute, (4-5) Route comparison endpoint works with proper validation and error messages.

bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.bug_1_empty_smiles: VERIFIED - Empty SMILES now returns valid=false with reason 'Empty SMILES string'
bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.bug_2_copilot_intent: VERIFIED - Natural language queries like 'How can I reduce the cost?' now correctly parse to cost_optimization action
bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.bug_3_claude_service: VERIFIED - ClaudeService always initializes self.client attribute to avoid AttributeError
bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.bug_4_route_comparison_validation: VERIFIED - Route comparison validates required fields and returns proper error messages
bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.bug_5_route_comparison_method: FIXED BY TESTING AGENT - Added missing compare_routes method to EnhancedRouteScorer

additional_fixes_by_testing_agent: Fixed HTTPException being caught by generic Exception handler in analyze_molecule endpoint (server.py line 170-172)
Added compare_routes method to EnhancedRouteScorer class that was missing
